checks.notes: Positive claims about Codex SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, OpenCode server/SDK, and UAR are tied to official docs or local code evidence.
The plan preserves the desired runtime breadth while rejecting the current provider-emulation approach inside the Claude runtime.
Problematic divergences include concrete failure modes, including semantic drift, permission mismatch, migration conflicts, and protocol overclaiming.
The plan is broad because the requested target is broad. It is split into implementation rounds and recommends Round 1 first.
UAR packaging is treated as feasible but gated by compliance and packaging verification rather than declared complete.
